station_address: CTS NO.128, New Link Rd, near Mahavir Nagar, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: This place is very close to Kandivali Metro Station. I have frequented this place a few times and I am happy with the service. Their meters are near-accurate from my experience. The place is big for a petrol station and it's very conveniently located.

station_address: CTS NO.128, New Link Rd, near Mahavir Nagar, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
I have filled petrol almost around 8 to 9 times and everytime I had an issue with the quantity. My fairly new bike never gives the optimum milage that it should be giving.
The second issue that I faced is their online mechanism is barely working, the internet is slow and many times my transaction has been declined wasting my time and risking my money.

station_address: CTS NO.128, New Link Rd, near Mahavir Nagar, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
Pathetic Experience – Avoid This Pump If You Can

Absolute joke of a place. If you're going to fill petrol here, first ask if the guy knows what he's doing—otherwise you're setting yourself up for a mess.

Went to fill petrol in my bike today at 7:16 PM, and the genius working there didn’t stop the nozzle in time. Result? Petrol overflowed and spilled everywhere—at least ₹100 worth just gone. When I pointed it out, another guy strolls over and casually says, "He’s new." Like that’s an excuse?

It turned into an argument, and a senior staff member said they'll pay me ₹28 in cash for the loss. Guess what? He gave me only ₹20. Not that ₹8 matters—but it’s the principle. The carelessness, the attitude, and the way they handled it—total garbage.

If this is how they train their staff and handle customers, I’m never going back. Be smart—don’t waste your money or time here.

station_address: CTS NO.128, New Link Rd, near Mahavir Nagar, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
If you fill petrol the entire tank, you have to ask for cleaning rear and front windshield they don't offer proactively.

The attendant will force you to open bonet and change oil and coolant, I repeat the attendants force you to change the coolant.

Pushy attendants!!!!

station_address: CTS NO.128, New Link Rd, near Mahavir Nagar, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
Company owned Company operated Fuel Bunker.

Plenty of fuel dispensers and space so there's not too much of a waiting time.

Also has a CNG station.

Always assured of good quality Petrol and Diesel. Have found the attendants to be quick, honest and accurate in their job. Never had a reason to complain.

Overall a 5⭐️ rated pump for quality products, quick in and out times and fast service.
